main.description: Import a foreign record on demand and project it into a `pub.layers.*` shape via the appview's registered panproto lens for the source NSID. Routes through `idiolect_lens::apply_lens` against a published `dev.panproto.schema.lens` record. Use this to lift a Margin note into an annotation layer, a Tangled issue into a corpus expression, etc., without writing the lensed record back to a PDS.

uri.description: AT-URI of the foreign record to project.

fresh.description: When true, bypass the local cache and refetch the source record.

source.description: Imported source record view, identical to `getExternal`'s response.

targetNsid.description: NSID of the projected record (always under `pub.layers.*`).

lensUri.description: AT-URI of the `dev.panproto.schema.lens` record that produced this output.
